faqs.q: How do you decide who to introduce me to?
faqs.a: We hand-pick each match based on your profile. In the form you first fill out, you'll tell us your work, interests, energy, and what kind of person you'd find interesting this week.
No. The Intro is for platonic, professional, and creative connections - co-founders, collaborators, mentors, friends etc.
We're starting with Melbourne because it's where we live, where we know the cafés, and where we can keep the curation tight. Other cities will come later.
Nothing for the founding cohort (while we have spots available)! We'll make pricing for future cohorts available soon.

faqs.q: What if the person you send me isn't a good fit?
faqs.a: Tell us! The goal is to make the best matches possible and we might not always get this right. Genuine connections are the goal and we learn from every piece of feedback.You can also pass on any week — see below.

faqs.q: Can I pause or skip a week?
faqs.a: Yes. Reply to any intro email with 'skip' or 'pause' and we'll hold off until you're ready.

faqs.q: Do you share my profile with anyone?
faqs.a: Only with the person we introduce you to that week, and only what's relevant. Your full profile is never published or browsable.
